pallor.name: Pallor
pallor.ask_text: Does the patient look pale, especially in the nails and eyes?

fatigue.name: Fatigue
fatigue.ask_text: Are you feeling very tired or fatigued?

dizziness.name: Dizziness
dizziness.ask_text: Do you feel dizzy or lightheaded?

brittle_nails.name: Brittle Nails
brittle_nails.ask_text: Are your nails brittle or spoon-shaped?

rapid_heartbeat.name: Rapid Heartbeat
rapid_heartbeat.ask_text: Is the heart beating very fast?

high_bp.name: High Blood Pressure
high_bp.ask_text: Is the blood pressure reading high?

swelling_face_hands.name: Swelling of Face/Hands
swelling_face_hands.ask_text: Do you have swelling in your face, hands, or feet?

severe_headache.name: Severe Headache
severe_headache.ask_text: Do you have a severe headache that won't go away?

blurred_vision.name: Blurred Vision
blurred_vision.ask_text: Is your vision blurry or are you seeing spots?

upper_abdominal_pain.name: Upper Abdominal Pain
upper_abdominal_pain.ask_text: Do you have pain in the upper part of your abdomen, below the ribs?

rapid_weight_gain.name: Rapid Weight Gain
rapid_weight_gain.ask_text: Have you gained weight suddenly in the last few days?

convulsions.name: Convulsions/Seizures
convulsions.ask_text: Has the patient had fits or convulsions?

unconsciousness.name: Unconsciousness
unconsciousness.ask_text: Is the patient unconscious or unresponsive?

abdominal_pain.name: Abdominal Pain
abdominal_pain.ask_text: Do you have pain in your abdomen?

cold_clammy_skin.name: Cold Clammy Skin
cold_clammy_skin.ask_text: Is the skin cold and clammy to touch?

chills.name: Chills
chills.ask_text: Are you experiencing chills or shivering?

foul_smelling_discharge.name: Foul-smelling Vaginal Discharge
foul_smelling_discharge.ask_text: Is there a foul-smelling discharge from the vagina?

lower_abdominal_pain.name: Lower Abdominal Pain
lower_abdominal_pain.ask_text: Do you have pain in the lower part of your abdomen?

tender_uterus.name: Tender Uterus
tender_uterus.ask_text: Is the uterus tender or painful when touched?

frequent_urination.name: Frequent Urination
frequent_urination.ask_text: Are you urinating more often than usual?

recurrent_infections.name: Recurrent Infections
recurrent_infections.ask_text: Have you been getting frequent infections like UTIs?

excessive_vomiting.name: Excessive Vomiting
excessive_vomiting.ask_text: Are you vomiting many times a day and unable to keep food down?

dehydration.name: Dehydration
dehydration.ask_text: Do you feel very thirsty with dry mouth and reduced urine?

weight_loss.name: Weight Loss
weight_loss.ask_text: Have you lost weight during pregnancy?

inability_to_eat.name: Inability to Eat
inability_to_eat.ask_text: Are you unable to eat or drink anything?

contractions_before_37wks.name: Premature Contractions
contractions_before_37wks.ask_text: Are you having regular contractions before 37 weeks?

lower_back_pain.name: Lower Back Pain
lower_back_pain.ask_text: Do you have a constant dull pain in your lower back?

pelvic_pressure.name: Pelvic Pressure
pelvic_pressure.ask_text: Do you feel heavy pressure in the pelvis?

leaking_fluid.name: Leaking Fluid
leaking_fluid.ask_text: Is there fluid leaking from the vagina?

abdominal_cramps.name: Abdominal Cramps
abdominal_cramps.ask_text: Are you having cramping in your abdomen?

prolonged_labour.name: Prolonged Labour
prolonged_labour.ask_text: Has labour been going on for more than 12 hours?

severe_abdominal_pain.name: Severe Abdominal Pain
severe_abdominal_pain.ask_text: Is the abdominal pain very severe and constant?

maternal_distress.name: Maternal Distress
maternal_distress.ask_text: Is the mother exhausted, distressed, or unable to push?

reduced_fetal_movement.name: Reduced Fetal Movement
reduced_fetal_movement.ask_text: Has the baby been moving less than usual?

not_breathing.name: Not Breathing
not_breathing.ask_text: Is the newborn not breathing or gasping?

not_crying.name: Not Crying
not_crying.ask_text: Did the baby not cry at birth?

blue_skin.name: Blue Skin Color
blue_skin.ask_text: Is the baby's skin blue or dusky?

limp_body.name: Limp/Floppy Body
limp_body.ask_text: Is the baby limp and floppy?

weak_cry.name: Weak Cry
weak_cry.ask_text: Is the baby's cry weak or absent?

slow_heartbeat_newborn.name: Slow Heartbeat (Newborn)
slow_heartbeat_newborn.ask_text: Is the baby's heartbeat slow or hard to feel?

fever_newborn.name: Fever (Newborn)
fever_newborn.ask_text: Does the baby feel hot to touch or have fever?

poor_feeding.name: Poor Feeding
poor_feeding.ask_text: Is the baby refusing to feed or feeding poorly?

lethargy_newborn.name: Lethargy (Newborn)
lethargy_newborn.ask_text: Is the baby unusually sleepy or not responding?

fast_breathing_newborn.name: Fast Breathing (Newborn)
fast_breathing_newborn.ask_text: Is the baby breathing very fast (more than 60 breaths per minute)?

umbilical_redness.name: Umbilical Redness
umbilical_redness.ask_text: Is there redness or swelling around the umbilical cord stump?

umbilical_pus.name: Umbilical Pus
umbilical_pus.ask_text: Is there pus or discharge from the umbilical cord stump?

skin_pustules.name: Skin Pustules
skin_pustules.ask_text: Does the baby have boils or pus-filled bumps on the skin?

bulging_fontanelle.name: Bulging Fontanelle
bulging_fontanelle.ask_text: Is the soft spot on the baby's head bulging?

yellow_skin.name: Yellow Skin
yellow_skin.ask_text: Is the baby's skin looking yellow?

yellow_eyes.name: Yellow Eyes
yellow_eyes.ask_text: Are the baby's eyes looking yellow?

low_weight.name: Low Birth Weight
low_weight.ask_text: Does the baby weigh less than 2.5 kg?

difficulty_sucking.name: Difficulty Sucking
difficulty_sucking.ask_text: Is the baby having trouble latching or sucking?

hypothermia_sign.name: Cold Body Temperature
hypothermia_sign.ask_text: Does the baby feel cold to touch?

cold_extremities.name: Cold Hands/Feet
cold_extremities.ask_text: Are the baby's hands and feet cold?

chest_indrawing.name: Chest Indrawing
chest_indrawing.ask_text: Is the baby's chest pulling inward when breathing?
